backtest_value: COVID-19 stay-at-home orders accelerated home-fitness purchases
workflow_interpretation: Demand shock was real and explicitly disclosed by company.

backtest_value: uncertain in FY2020-FY2021; normalization visible by Q2 FY2022
workflow_interpretation: Require post-shock hardware demand evidence before actionability.

backtest_value: engagement stayed high but average monthly workouts per subscription fell from 22.0 in FY2021 to 16.4 in FY2022
workflow_interpretation: Installed-base engagement alone cannot validate new hardware demand.

backtest_value: average net monthly churn rose from 0.61% in FY2021 to 0.96% in FY2022
workflow_interpretation: Retention remained relatively strong but weakened; not the main failure signal.

backtest_value: FY2022 connected fitness product revenue fell 30.5% after FY2021 surge
workflow_interpretation: Hardware demand normalized sharply and should have blocked actionability.

backtest_value: FY2022 connected fitness products gross margin fell to negative 11.3% from 29.0%
workflow_interpretation: The hardware acquisition engine stopped subsidizing subscription growth.

backtest_value: inventory rose from $937.1M at June 30 2021 to $1.541B at December 31 2021
workflow_interpretation: Inventory commitment increased before normalized demand was proven.

backtest_value: subscriber base partly downstream of prior hardware placements
workflow_interpretation: Subscription growth could lag hardware weakness and therefore cannot alone prove future growth.

backtest_value: source gap in hot phase and negative by FY2022
workflow_interpretation: Actionability requires evidence that unit economics survive normal demand.

backtest_value: peak price market-cap range and near-peak EV now source-backed; consensus exception pending reviewer acceptance
workflow_interpretation: Valuation heat is now supported directionally, but public-grade conclusion still needs consensus export or reviewer-accepted exception.

backtest_value: extreme heat versus incomplete normalized hardware evidence
workflow_interpretation: This is the core pre-collapse downgrade trigger.
